response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of distributed systems or cloud compute leadership, and no clear track record in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous technical projects at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Active open-source contributor with documented tools and platforms
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and engineering practices
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks evidence of technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or architectural ownership
